assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Frontmatter contains name: git-commit-helper and description: 'Analyzes staged git changes and generates conventional commit messages...'

assertion_results.text: The name field uses only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions
assertion_results.evidence: Description contains: 'Use when writing commit messages, committing code, generating changelogs, asking about conventional commits, or when the user mentions git commit, commit message, staged changes, or conventional commits.'

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a numbered workflow or step-by-step instructions
assertion_results.evidence: Body contains numbered workflow: '### 1. Gather staged changes', '### 2. Determine the commit type', '### 3. Determine the scope', '### 4. Write the subject line', '### 5. Add body and footer if needed', '### 6. Present the commit message'

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with at least one Bun TypeScript script (.ts file)
assertion_results.evidence: scripts/analyze-diff.ts exists (452 lines), starts with #!/usr/bin/env bun, uses import { $ } from 'bun'

assertion_results.text: The script includes a --help flag or usage documentation
assertion_results.evidence: analyze-diff.ts line 82: if (args.includes('--help') || args.includes('-h')) { console.log(HELP); process.exit(0); } — HELP constant contains full usage docs

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertion_results.evidence: No evals/evals.json file found. Glob search for **/evals.json in the output directory returned no results. No evals/ directory exists.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 134: '## Common mistakes' section with a table of 8 mistake/fix pairs

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertion_results.evidence: SKILL.md is 221 lines, well under the 500 line limit

assertion_results.text: The script uses structured JSON output to stdout
assertion_results.evidence: analyze-diff.ts line 445: console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)); — outputs DiffAnalysis interface as JSON to stdout, diagnostics go to stderr
